name: engine-mcp-api
description: Test MCP server management API - list, add, remove, update servers and session MCP status

steps.title: Test 2: GET /mcp/servers - list all configured servers

steps.command: TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://127.0.0.1:7433/mcp/servers | jq .

TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7433/mcp/servers -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name": "test-server", "type": "stdio", "command": "npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-memory", "enabled": false, "description": "Test server via API"}' | jq .

TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7433/mcp/servers -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name": "memory", "type": "stdio", "command": "test"}'

TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -X PUT http://127.0.0.1:7433/mcp/servers/test-server -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"enabled": true, "description": "Updated via API"}' | jq .
TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -X DELETE http://127.0.0.1:7433/mcp/servers/test-server -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq .

steps.title: Test 8: POST /sessions - create session with MCP servers

steps.command: TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7433/sessions -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"profile": "default", "mcp_servers": ["memory"]}' | jq .
steps.description: Create session with memory MCP server

steps.command: SESSION_ID=$(TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7433/sessions -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"profile": "default", "mcp_servers": ["memory"]}' | jq -r '.session_id') && echo $SESSION_ID
steps.description: Capture session ID for subsequent tests

steps.title: Test 9: GET /sessions/{id}/mcp - get session MCP status

steps.command: TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && SESSION_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:7433/sessions -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"profile": "default"}' | jq -r '.session_id') && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://127.0.0.1:7433/sessions/$SESSION_ID/mcp | jq .

steps.description: Get MCP status for non-existent session

steps.title: Test 11: GET /mcp/servers - verify test server removed

steps.command: TOKEN=$(cat ~/.kollab/engine.token 2>/dev/null || echo '') && curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://127.0.0.1:7433/mcp/servers | jq -r '.total'
